_status: NEEDS TRANSLATION — English fallback values; replace with real Hebrew. Do not machine-translate.

hero.headline: Programs designed for the classrooms you already have.
hero.aside: Whether you serve thirty students or three thousand, we shape our programs around your school's rhythm — not the other way around.

programs.title: In-School English Immersion
programs.body: Weekly, ongoing classes inside the school day — taught fully in English by a native speaker.

programs.title: After-School Enrichment
programs.body: Small-group sessions focused on conversation, games, and confidence-building.

programs.title: English Camps & Intensives
programs.body: Vacation-week programs that pack months of practice into days of immersion.

programs.title: Teacher Co-Teaching
programs.body: Native English speakers paired with local teachers to co-design lessons and model live conversation.

programs.title: Community Center Programs
programs.body: Open-access classes hosted at municipal and community partners — serving Arab and Jewish neighborhoods alike.

programs.title: Bespoke Partnerships
programs.body: Custom programs designed with your school's curriculum, calendar, and goals in mind.

steps.title: Discovery Call
steps.body: We listen first — your students, your goals, your constraints.

steps.title: Program Design
steps.body: We propose a shape and pace tailored to your school.

steps.title: Teacher Match
steps.body: We pair you with native educators who fit your community.

steps.title: Launch & Iterate
steps.body: We begin, measure, and refine — together, every term.

cta.title: Ready to bring Bridges into your classrooms?

meta.title: Schools & Institutions — Bridges Institute
meta.description: Programs for schools, community centers, and municipalities across the Negev. Native English-speaking educators delivering measurable, joyful results.
